summary: Frontend-only verification of Phase 3 (masonry grid, hover-download w/ progress, progressive lightbox w/ counter/keyboard/fav/download) and Phase 4 (music picker, intro, playing slideshow w/ Ken Burns crossfade, auto-hiding controls, progress dots, continue-without-music) on public share https://handoff-app-5.preview.emergentagent.com/s/eva-ella-27-06-26. All feature checks passed. Phase 2 regressions (hero couple-name, instruction cards, album cards, favourites toggle + Submit for Album, Order Prints coming-soon toast, theme toggle persistence) also passed.
critical_code_review_comments: Slideshow.js keyboard handler is intentionally re-registered every render (eslint-disable) — works but creates/removes listeners each render; consider using a ref for toggleMute/close to make deps stable.

ShareView.js: `theme-toggle` data-testid is used on both the floating hero header button and the album header button; not a bug (only one is rendered at a time) but worth noting for future disambiguation.

Slideshow controls test-id `slideshow-controls` container has `opacity:0` when auto-hidden but remains clickable (no pointer-events:none) — clicks in the hidden region may still hit invisible buttons.
seed_data_creation: None (used existing public share eva-ella-27-06-26 with 6 photos).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Public share URL /s/eva-ella-27-06-26 has 6 photos (solid-colour placeholders by design). Slide auto-advance is 6s; intro is 4s. Audio autoplay is blocked in headless — verify UI state, not audible sound. lb-download text switch from 'Download' -> '{n}%' is only visible while a real download is in flight (short for small files).
